data.title: Hicks Law
data.description: Simplified navigation through reduced choices, improving decision-making speed.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined menus, focused content, quick action paths.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Designed interactive elements that are sized and positioned for easy access.
data.technical_spec: Button size optimization, proximity distribution, hover effects.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Visually appealing design increases perceived usability of the Apple website.
data.technical_spec: Visual hierarchy, brand-consistent styling, whitespace utilization.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Consistency with user expectations derived from other sites for intuitive use.
data.technical_spec: Standard navigation layout, common UI patterns, expected workflows.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Content is chunked into smaller units to aid user comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Content grouping, section headers, list formatting.
